name: Sweet and Sour Turkey Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds skinless turkey light meat, pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine orange juice and cornstarch in a bowl. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients: chutney, mango; cider vinegar; brown sugar; garlic; dried basil; cinnamon; nutmeg; ground ginger; salt and pepper to taste.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place the skinless turkey pieces in an oven-safe casserole dish.
5. Spread the sauce evenly over the turkey.
6. Bake for about 1 hour, basting occasionally until the turkey is cooked through.
Recipe received from Jean Hopkins (Mom)
Formatted into Mastercook by Carol Floyd--c.floyd@arnprior.com
Made with skinless chicken breasts. Really good.
